de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct

Class ProgramTransformer

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaProgramElement
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct.ProgramTransformer
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Expression, ExpressionContainer, ModelElement, NamedModelElement, NamedProgramElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, Reference, MemberReference, NameReference, PackageReferenceContainer, ReferencePrefix, ReferenceSuffix, TypeReference, TypeReferenceContainer, TypeReferenceInfix, SourceElement, Statement, StatementContainer, SVSubstitute
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ArrayLength, ArrayPostDecl, ConstructorCall, CreateObject, DoBreak, EnhancedForElimination, EvaluateArgs, ExpandMethodBody, ForToWhile, InitArray, IsStatic, MethodCall, MultipleVarDecl, PostWork, SpecialConstructorCall, StaticInitialisation, SwitchToIf, TypeOf, Unpack, UnwindLoop

    public abstract class ProgramTransformer
extends JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
implements StatementContainer, Statement, Expression, TypeReference
    ProgramTransformers are used to describe schematic transformations that cannot be expressed by the taclet language itself. For example:
    1. transformations needing access to the java (type) model, e.g dynamic dispatch of program methods
    2. complex transformations that are hard (or not) to express via taclets, for example unwinding a loop (together with replacing continues or unlabeled breaks with a labeled break)
    (Program)MetaConstructs should be used with care as they make it hard to validate (verify) rules and import nearly the complete power of Java into taclets.

    • Method Detail

      • transform

        public abstract ProgramElement transform(ProgramElement pe,
                                         Services services,
                                         SVInstantiations svInst)
        performs the program transformation needed for symbolic program transformation
        Parameters:
        pe - the ProgramElement on which the execution is performed
        services - the Services with all necessary information about the java programs
        svInst - the instantiations of the schemavariables
        Returns:
        the transformated program

        Finds the source element that occurs last in the source.
        Specified by:
        getLastElement in interface SourceElement
